_meta.description: Guided tap-point recipes for annotate_actions.py. Click each target on the listed screenshot.

recipes.summary: Doubles turn command menu (Fight / Pokémon / Info / Run)

points.title: Fight
points.hint: Center of the orange Fight button on the right command panel.

points.title: Pokémon
points.hint: Center of the Pokémon / switch button below Fight.

points.title: Battle info
points.hint: Center of the info / summary button above Fight.

points.title: Run / forfeit
points.hint: Top-left back / forfeit control.

points.title: Dismiss background
points.hint: Far-right edge tap used to close sub-menus without confirming.

recipes.summary: Move selection panel (4 moves + gimmicks + back)

points.title: Move slot 1
points.hint: Center of the top move row (canonical alphabetical slot 1).

points.title: Move slot 2
points.hint: Second move row from the top.

points.title: Move slot 3
points.hint: Third move row.

points.title: Move slot 4
points.hint: Bottom move row.

points.title: Move info
points.hint: Small info / type icon area above move 1 (optional detail tap).

points.title: Back
points.hint: Bottom-right back control returning to the command menu.

points.title: Mega Evolution
points.hint: Mega button when visible on the move panel.

points.title: Terastallize
points.hint: Tera button when visible on the move panel.

recipes.summary: Target picker overlay (2x2 grid after choosing a targeted move)

points.title: Opponent slot A
points.hint: Top-left target cell (left opponent).

points.title: Opponent slot B
points.hint: Top-right target cell (right opponent).

points.title: Ally slot A
points.hint: Bottom-left target cell (your left active / self).

points.title: Ally slot B
points.hint: Bottom-right target cell (your right active).

points.title: Close overlay
points.hint: Close / cancel button on the target panel.

recipes.summary: Switch-in / Cancel popup offsets (relative to tapped bench row)

points.title: Switch in
points.hint: On 20260624_232626 (Garchomp / roster row 3 selected): click Switch in. Saved as offset from teampreview.roster_slot_3.

points.title: Cancel switch
points.hint: Click Cancel on the same popup. Offset is computed vs roster_slot_3.

points.title: Back
points.hint: Bottom-right Back button (fixed screen position, not relative to popup).

recipes.summary: Forced replacement popup (Switch in / Cancel) after a faint, anchored to the tapped party row

points.title: Switch in
points.hint: On 20260624_232626 the 3rd party row (Garchomp) is selected and its Switch in / Cancel popup is open. Click 'Switch in'. Saved as an offset from force_switch.slot_3 so it applies to whichever row gets tapped.

points.title: Cancel switch
points.hint: Click 'Cancel' on the same popup. Also stored as an offset from force_switch.slot_3.

points.title: Fight
points.hint: Center of the Fight button on the right panel.

points.title: Pokémon
points.hint: Pokémon / switch button.

points.title: Battle info
points.hint: Info button above Fight.

points.title: Run / forfeit
points.hint: Top-left forfeit control.

points.title: Hide summary
points.hint: Dismiss the mid-battle summary / stats overlay.

points.title: Back
points.hint: Bottom-right back from summary or sub-menu.
